mapper.sql: cr.id, cr.room_type, cr.title, cr.event_id, cr.is_admin_only AS admin_only, cr.created_by_user_id, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at, COALESCE( cr.title, CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'direct' THEN ( SELECT u.full_name FROM chat_members cm_other INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm_other.user_id WHERE cm_other.room_id = cr.id AND cm_other.user_id <> #{userId} ORDER BY u.full_name ASC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END, 'Razgovor' ) AS display_title, CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'direct' THEN ( SELECT u.avatar_url FROM chat_members cm_other INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm_other.user_id WHERE cm_other.room_id = cr.id AND cm_other.user_id <> #{userId} ORDER BY u.full_name ASC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END AS avatar_url, CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'direct' THEN ( SELECT u.id FROM chat_members cm_other INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm_other.user_id WHERE cm_other.room_id = cr.id AND cm_other.user_id <> #{userId} ORDER BY u.full_name ASC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END AS direct_user_id, CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'event' THEN 'Event grupa' WHEN cr.is_admin_only THEN 'Admin-only' WHEN cr.room_type = 'group' THEN 'Grupa' ELSE 'Privatni razgovor' END AS subtitle, COALESCE( CASE lm.message_type WHEN 'event_share' THEN 'Podijeljen event' WHEN 'poll' THEN 'Poll' ELSE lm.body END, 'Nema poruka jos.' ) AS last_message, lm.created_at AS last_message_at, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(lm.created_at, 'HH24:MI'), TO_CHAR(cr.updated_at, 'HH24:MI')) AS time_label, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages unread LEFT JOIN message_reads mr ON mr.room_id = cr.id AND mr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE unread.room_id = cr.id AND unread.sender_user_id IS DISTINCT FROM #{userId} AND (mr.read_at IS NULL OR unread.created_at > mr.read_at) ) AS unread_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_members member_count WHERE member_count.room_id = cr.id ) AS member_count, cm.role AS my_role
mapper.select: SELECT id, contact, last_message_hr, last_message_en, time_label FROM conversations ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id ASC
SELECT id, contact, last_message_hr, last_message_en, time_label FROM conversations WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms cr LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON TRUE WHERE cm.user_id IS NOT NULL
AND ( cr.title ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_members cm_query INNER JOIN app_users u_query ON u_query.id = cm_query.user_id WHERE cm_query.room_id = cr.id AND u_query.full_name ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' ) OR lm.body ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' )
ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.created_at, cr.updated_at) DESC, cr.id ASC

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms cr LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON TRUE WHERE cr.id = #{roomId} AND cm.user_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms cr LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON TRUE WHERE cr.room_type = 'event' AND cr.event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM chat_rooms cr INNER JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT * FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON TRUE WHERE cr.room_type = 'direct' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_members target_member WHERE target_member.room_id = cr.id AND target_member.user_id = #{memberUserId} ) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_members direct_count WHERE direct_count.room_id = cr.id ) = 2 LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_type = 'event' AND event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_user_id, u.full_name AS sender_name, u.avatar_url AS sender_avatar_url, m.message_type, m.body, m.event_id, m.poll_id, m.created_at FROM messages m LEFT JOIN app_users u ON u.id = m.sender_user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.sender_user_id, u.full_name AS sender_name, u.avatar_url AS sender_avatar_url, m.message_type, m.body, m.event_id, m.poll_id, m.created_at FROM messages m LEFT JOIN app_users u ON u.id = m.sender_user_id WHERE m.id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1

SELECT cm.room_id, cm.user_id, u.full_name, u.avatar_url, cm.role FROM chat_members cm INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm.user_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY CASE cm.role WHEN 'owner' THEN 0 WHEN 'admin' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, u.full_name ASC
SELECT cm.room_id, cm.user_id, u.full_name, u.avatar_url, cm.role FROM chat_members cm INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm.user_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, full_name, email, avatar_url FROM app_users WHERE id <> #{userId} AND (full_name ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%' OR email ILIKE '%' || #{query} || '%') ORDER BY full_name ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT id, room_id, question, allow_multiple, created_by_user_id, closes_at, created_at FROM polls WHERE id = #{pollId} LIMIT 1

SELECT po.id, po.poll_id, po.text, po.sort_order, COUNT(pv.option_id)::INTEGER AS vote_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM poll_votes my_vote WHERE my_vote.poll_id = po.poll_id AND my_vote.option_id = po.id AND my_vote.user_id = #{userId} ) AS voted_by_me FROM poll_options po LEFT JOIN poll_votes pv ON pv.poll_id = po.poll_id AND pv.option_id = po.id WHERE po.poll_id = #{pollId} GROUP BY po.id, po.poll_id, po.text, po.sort_order ORDER BY po.sort_order ASC, po.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( id, room_type, title, event_id, is_admin_only, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{roomType}, #{title}, #{eventId}, #{adminOnly}, #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET is_admin_only = #{adminOnly}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages ( id, room_id, sender_user_id, message_type, body, event_id, poll_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{roomId}, #{senderUserId}, #{messageType}, #{body}, #{eventId}, #{pollId} )

INSERT INTO message_reads ( room_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, read_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{messageId}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (room_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET last_read_message_id = EXCLUDED.last_read_message_id, read_at = EXCLUDED.read_at
INSERT INTO polls ( id, room_id, question, allow_multiple, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{roomId}, #{question}, #{allowMultiple}, #{createdByUserId} )
INSERT INTO poll_options ( id, poll_id, text, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{pollId}, #{text}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET last_message_hr = #{lastMessageHr}, last_message_en = #{lastMessageEn}, time_label = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'HH24:MI'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
